**Type of data contribution**
- [ ] Add a new university
- [ ] Add a new professor
- [ ] Update QS ranking data
- [ ] Correct existing data
- [ ] Other

**Please provide the details below:**

- University name (Chinese & English):
- Region:
- Department / School:
- Professor name:
- Any relevant links (official page, Google Scholar, etc.):

**Additional context**
Any notes about why this data is important to include.
